content: Combining the task-agnostic self-improvement framework of Self-Refine with multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms creates a hierarchical self-improvement pipeline: Self-Refine’s iterative feedback loop can be augmented by integrating self-reflection’s inconsistent, multiple problem-solving perspectives as the source of internal self-feedback, rather than relying on the model’s default single-perspective critique. This removes the implicit bias of single-perspective self-feedback that often causes Self-Refine to converge on minor local optimizations instead of meaningful global output improvements.
